item.title: @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur doing the Gangnam Style dance by PSY brings a classic viral K-pop dance back with full brainrot energy. The iconic horse dance, the instantly recognizable Gangnam Style beat, and Tung Tung Tung Sahur’s
